attachments.fallback: Between 11:30 AM and 12:45 PM PDT we experienced elevated API error rates for EC2 in the US-EAST-1 Region. The issue has been resolved and the service is operating normally.

text.text:
*AWS Health Event*
Between 11:30 AM and 12:45 PM PDT we experienced elevated API error rates for EC2 in the US-EAST-1 Region. The issue has been resolved and the service is operating normally.
